translation.description: Machine translation: evaluate the quality assessment for the provided source text and corresponding translated output.

aspects.overall: Overall quality of the translation, considering all aspects of the text.

summary.description: Summarization: evaluate the fluency assessment for the provided article and corresponding summary output.

aspects.coherence: The logical and orderly presentation of ideas in a summary, ensuring that it is well-structured and easy to follow.
aspects.consistency: The degree to which a summary maintains the same style, tone, and perspective as the original text, without contradictions.
aspects.fluency: The ability of a summary to be easily read and understood, with a natural flow and use of language.
aspects.relevance: The extent to which a summary captures the most important and pertinent information from the original text, omitting extraneous details.
aspects.overall: Overall quality of the summary, considering all aspects of the text.

formula_explanation.description: Excel Formula Explanation: evaluate one aggregated/compiled quality assessment for the input of: multiple pairs of formulas and corresponding explanations.

aspects.accuracy: The aggregated correctness and precision of each of the explanations in representing the corresponding Excel formulas, ensuring that the information provided is true and conforms to established facts or principles.
aspects.completeness: The aggregated extent to which each of the explanations cover all necessary aspects of the corresponding Excel formulas, leaving no essential component or step unaddressed.
aspects.clarity: The aggregated ease with which each of the explanations can be understood, emphasizing simplicity, coherence, and the avoidance of ambiguity or confusion.
aspects.relevance: The aggregated extent to which each of the explanations are directly related to the corresponding Excel formulas and provides relevant information.
aspects.overall: Overall aggregated quality of each of the explanations for corresponding Excel formulas, considering all aspects.

instruct_excel.description: Excel user query: evaluate the amibuity assessment for the provided Excel user instruction query.

aspects.ambiguity: The presence of uncertainty or multiple interpretations in an Excel user instruction query.

metachecklists.description: Quality of Checklists: evaluate the quality assessment for the provided checklists for evaluation.

aspects.overall: The overall quality of the checklists for evaluation, considering all aspects of the checklist.
